content: ajv-cli: validates JSON/JSON5/YAML data against JSON Schema. Supports multiple files via glob or repeated flags. Exit code 1 on validation failure. --errors flag controls format; forks add 'pretty' (source loc + JSON path + inline message) and 'line' formats. Also supports --changes to detect data mutation after Ajv coercion. Schema itself can be JSON or YAML. No watch mode.
